cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Hello Sir, I am from the Post Office. A parcel for you has been returned, but the address is unclear. Can you please confirm your full address for re-delivery?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Haan, okay... My address is... (pauses) Wait, let me check... (background noise) Ah, yes... It's 123, Sector 4, Gurgaon

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Great, thank you, Sir! And can I also have your date of birth, please? Just for our records, ji?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: (distracted) Date of birth... (pauses) 12th February, 1990... (background noise) Look, can we make it quick? I'm in the middle of something

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Absolutely, Sir! I just need to confirm a few more details... (pauses) Can you also tell me your full name, please?

slow_thinking_rationale: At 78s: Policy violation detected. Agent has made requests that breach security protocols. Conversation flagged as fraudulent.

scenario_info.description: An agent calls, "Sir, I am from the Post Office. A parcel for you has been returned, but the address is unclear. Can you please confirm your full address and date of birth for re-delivery?" The scammer is phishing for a valid name, address, and DOB combination for identity theft, using a harmless pretext.
